# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-admin
spec:
  components:
    ingressGateways:
      - name: istio-ingressgateway
        enabled: false
    egressGateways:
      - name: istio-egressgateway
        enabled: false
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        adminPort: 15000
        proxyAdminPort: 15000
    pilot:
      configMap: true
    sidecarInjectorWebhook:
      injectedAnnotations:
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "15000"
        prometheus.io/path: "/stats"
  meshConfig:
    enableTracing: true
    enablePrometheusMerge: true
    defaultConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
      concurrency: 2
      discoveryAddress: istiod.istio-system.svc.cluster.local:15012
      drainDuration: 45s
      parentShutdownDuration: 60s
      proxyMetadata:
        ISTIO_META_ENABLE_H2C: "true"
        ISTIO_META_PROXY_ADMIN_PORT: "15000"
        ISTIO_META_PROXY_ADMIN_PATH: "/stats"
        ISTIO_META_PROXY_ADMIN_ENDPOINTS: "/config_dump,/stats,/clusters"
    accessLogFile: /dev/stdout
    accessLogFormat: |
      [%START_TIME%] "%REQ(:METHOD)% %REQ(X-FORWARD-FOR)% %PROTOCOL%" %RESPONSE_CODE% %RESPONSE_FLAGS% %BYTES_RECEIVED% %BYTES_SENT% %DURATION% %REQUEST_ID% %TRUSTED_CA% %UPSTREAM_HOST% %UPSTREAM_CLUSTER% %UPSTREAM_LOCAL_ADDRESS% %DOWNSTREAM_LOCAL_ADDRESS% %DOWNSTREAM_PEER_SUBJECT% %DOWNSTREAM_PEER_URI_SAN% %DOWNSTREAM_PEER_FINGERPRINT% %DOWNSTREAM_PEER_IP% %DOWNSTREAM_LOCAL_IP% %UPSTREAM_TRANSPORT_FAILURE_REASON% %UPSTREAM_PROTOCOL% %DOWNSTREAM_PROTOCOL% %REQUESTED_SERVER_NAME% %ROUTE_NAME% %REQ(X-ENVOY-ORIGINAL-PATH)% %REQ(X-ENVOY-ORIGINAL-QUERY)% %REQ(X-ENVOY-ORIGINAL-IP)%
